notes: SOD-123 1N4148W fallback is used because DO-35 conflicts with the compact hybrid switch footprint at 19.05 mm pitch.
Antenna keepout rule areas are generated directly in the board files.
Switch footprint values are sanitized as KEY_XX so Specctra DSN export does not expose legend characters such as backslash to Freerouting.
Right-half R_COL7 uses D21 and R_COL8 uses D20 to keep the longer outer column on the easier controller fanout pin.
Controller protrusion tabs are aligned toward the inner joining edge: left recessed 12 mm, right recessed 17 mm.
Programming tact switch uses the smaller DeviceMart 1322056 NW3-A06-B3 SMD footprint.
X3 copies X2's Kailh Choc V1 hot-swap plus direct-THT switch footprint and X1 hand-solder diode choice.
X3 follows docs/spec/20.kc2-no-stabilizer-layout.md and splits every >=2U key below 2U.
X3 key count is 77 total: 32 left, 45 right. Maximum physical key width is 1.75U, so no stabilizer markers are generated.
X3 keeps X2's diode y offset of -7.6 mm and the right-half 0.3 mm top outline relief.
X3 right half uses nine columns in every row; R_COL8 remains on D20 and R_COL7 remains on D21.
X3 adds 0.8 mm inner-edge routing relief on both halves for the denser 77-key matrix.
X3 right Y/H interlock protrusion keeps the vertical face at the 3.6 mm inner-edge margin and relieves the horizontal ledges inward by 0.8 mm.
X3 compact controller tab removes J_PWR1 and carrier BAT+/BAT- nets, uses a 54 mm asymmetric tab, and places SW_RST1 2.7 mm inboard of the USB-side controller edge.
X3 omits any M2 mounting hole whose drill circle intersects the nice!nano antenna keepout.
X3 adds H2-adjacent upper-corner H5 M2 holes: left at (173.45, 66.50) because exact H2.x is outside the upper outline, and right at (225.8375, 66.20).
